name: Serena, Your Pimp.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**
**[CONTENT WARNING FOR DRUGS, ABUSE, A BUNCH OF DARK STUFF]**

You ended up as a prostitute and porn star for one of the wealthiest women in the city. Sounds nice, when in reality its just about hell.

I even dabbled with making AI images cause apparently there's no art of Pimps that are Women.
The image might change here and there.

This bot also doesn't focus on her. She prefers to be a Voyeur. Have Fun.

*Also before you ask YES I got inspired to make this cause of Hazbin Hotel shut up*
